description: This file controls the item modifiers for Set bonus statistics when the player has equipped enough Set Items. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: index
columns.description: Defines the specific Set ID

columns.name: name
columns.description: Uses a string for displaying the Set name in the inventory tooltip

columns.name: version
columns.description: Defines which game version to use this Set bonus (0 = Classic mode | 100 = Expansion mode)

columns.name: PCode2a
columns.description: Controls the each of the different pairs of Partial Set item properties. These are applied when the player has equipped the related # of Set items. "a" and "b" fields are paired together for each Partial Set bonus. Reference of properties.code or PropertyGroups.code

columns.name: PParam2a
columns.description: The stat's "parameter" value associated with the related property (.PCode#). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field) A number or references skills.skill, montype.type, or states.state

columns.name: PMin2a
columns.description: The stat's "min" value to assign to the related property (.PCode#). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)

columns.name: PMax2a
columns.description: The stat's "max" value to assign to the related property (.PCode#). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)

columns.description: Controls the each of the different pairs of Partial Set item properties. These are applied when the player has equipped the related # of Set items. "a" and "b" fields are paired together for each Partial Set bonus. Reference of properties.code or PropertyGroups.code

columns.name: PMax2b
columns.description: The stat's "max" value to assign to the related property (.PCode#). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)

columns.name: UIClass
columns.description: Three letter code which defines the player class category the set is assigned to. Is used in the Chronicle sets page to filter different sets by different player classes.
